description: Represents a blog post with all content and metadata
name: BlogPost

id.description: Unique identifier for the blog post

name.description: Internal name of the blog post

slug.description: URL slug for the blog post

postBody.description: HTML content of the blog post body

postSummary.description: Summary or excerpt of the blog post

blogAuthorId.description: ID of the associated blog author

contentGroupId.description: ID of the blog this post belongs to

campaign.description: Campaign GUID associated with the post

state.description: Current state of the blog post

publishDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was/will be published

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was created

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was last updated

archivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the post was archived

currentlyPublished.description: Whether the post is currently published

domain.description: Domain where the post is published

featuredImageAltText.description: Alt text for the featured image

headHtml.description: Custom HTML for the head section

footerHtml.description: Custom HTML for the footer section

language.description: Language code of the blog post

translatedFromId.description: ID of the original post this was translated from

tagIds.description: Array of tag IDs associated with the post

useFeaturedImage.description: Whether to display the featured image

url.description: Full URL of the published post

abTestId.description: A/B test ID if part of a test

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing the post
